advisory.reason: Baseline threshold (0.3) already yielded 50 nodes. Lowering threshold is likely unnecessary noise.

pilot_evaluation.reason: Uncertain topology or borderline metrics - Manual calibration needed.

model_policy_reason: Production Policy v1: Haiku-only due to graph density ceiling

questions.question: What is the purpose of the 'GL_SS_HUB_ISP.exe' tool?
questions.justification: The synthesis text states that the 'GL_SS_HUB_ISP.exe' tool is used to perform the 'hub flash dump' operation on the HP 549pm device.

questions.question: What are the main steps involved in dumping the flash on the HP 549pm device?
questions.justification: The synthesis text outlines the four main steps involved in dumping the flash on the HP 549pm device: 1) Open the 'GL_SS_HUB_ISP.exe' tool, 2) Confirm the flash to be dumped and select the 'Dump Flash' option, 3) Select the 'Chip' option and click 'OK', 4) Wait for the file to be saved and send the ROM file to the analyst.

questions.question: Where can I find information on the Genesys Logic firmware security signing and verification process?
questions.justification: The synthesis text mentions that the Genesys Logic firmware security signing and verification process is documented in the 'Genesys Logic Firmware 安全簽署與驗證流程 (Code Signing)' document.
